title: Provision framework_development advisor (template=engineering-advisor)
justification: Project contains WAI framework protocols and teaching infrastructure; requires dedicated oversight of architecture, history/evolution, and expedition/timeline management
perceive: Provision a new 'framework_development' advisor for this spoke. Ozi team-coverage eval identified this as the highest-priority gap. Justification: Project contains WAI framework protocols and teaching infrastructure; requires dedicated oversight of architecture, history/evolution, and expedition/timeline management Hub templates: /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/. Roster: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/registry.json. Pattern to follow: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
execute: 1. Read /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/engineering-advisor/charter.md. This is the template you will adapt.
2. Set advisor_id='framework_development' (use the domain name exactly — do not reuse or rename existing advisor entries).
3. Create directory WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/ if it does not exist.

4. Write WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/context_prompt.md — adapt the engineering-advisor charter: set advisor_id=framework_development, domain=framework_development, mission statement (2 sentences), responsibilities (3-5 bullet points specific to this spoke), escalation-to-Ozi rule. Do NOT copy boilerplate verbatim — tailor to this spoke's goals.
5. STOP AND VERIFY: confirm WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/context_prompt.md now exists and is non-empty. If it does not exist, stop — do not proceed.

7. Update WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/registry.json: add entry advisor_id=framework_development, status=stub, department_id=engineering, domain=framework_development, initialized_from_template=engineering-advisor. If entry exists, update it. Preserve all other entries.

8. Update WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json: if advisor_id absent, append {"advisor_id": "framework_development", "run_cadence": "weekly", "event_triggers": [], "last_run_at": null, "next_recommended_run": null}.

9. Update WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/ozi/scan_state.json: in team_coverage.gaps_detected, set the entry with domain=framework_development to proposal_status=provisioned. If team_coverage key is absent, create it.
verify: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/context_prompt.md exists and is non-empty; WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/scan_state.json exists with status=stub; registry.json has entry advisor_id=framework_development status=stub; schedule-index.json has weekly entry for framework_development; ozi/scan_state.json team_coverage.gaps_detected[domain=framework_development].proposal_status == 'provisioned'.
acceptance_criteria: schedule-index.json has weekly entry for framework_development
completion_notes: framework_development advisor provisioned: context_prompt.md written (tailored to WAI protocol/teaching domain), scan_state.json created (status=stub), registry.json updated (engineering dept), schedule-index.json created (weekly cadence), ozi/scan_state.json gaps_detected updated (proposal_status=provisioned). All 5 acceptance criteria verified.
